verses.text: Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Mite a puktheihna ding ze-etna hong piang hamtang ding hi. Ahi zongin tua pukna ding a piangsak mipa in gimna ngah ding hi
Hih naupangno khat a khialhna ding a pian'sak sangin a ngawngah an gawina suang lianpi khat khihin tuipi sungah kikhia leh ama-a' dingin hoihzaw thampek ding hi
Note hoihtakin kingaihsun un. Na sanggampa uh no tungah hong khialh leh amah taii un la, a kisik leh a mawhna maisak un
Nikhat sungin sagihvei ciangdong hong khialh hangin zong, a sagihvei mahin no kiangah hong pai-in, ‘Ka kisik hi,’ hong cih nak leh na maisak khin ding uh hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Ka Upna uh Hong Liansak In

verses.text: Nikhat, sawltakte in Topa kiangah, “Ka upna uh hong liansak in,” a ci uh hi
Topa in, “Ankam tang cia a pha upna nei le uh cin, hih nailung kung kiangah, ‘Kizunglot in la tuipi sungah va po in,’ ci le uh cin na cih bangun piangzo ding hi.
“Note khatpeuh in na lo uh hong khawhsak ahi a, na tuu uh a hong cin'sak ahi zongin nasem khat nei le uh cin, inn-ah a hong tun' ciangin, ‘Hong pai in la na an ne pah in,’ na ci uh hiam
Na ci kei uh hi. Ama kiangah, ‘Ka nitak-an ding hong bawl in la, na puan silhin ka annek sungteng hong vil in. Ka man khit ciangin na ne thei ding hi,’ na cizaw uh hi
Tua bangin a sawlteng a sepna hangin a nasempa tungah, ‘Ka nuam mahmah hi,’ ci tuanlo hi
Tua mah bangin note in zong hong kisawlteng na sepkhit uh ciangin, ‘Nasem mawkmawkte mah ihi a, i tavuanteng bek mah a sem khin ihi hi,’ na ci uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.
Jerusalem khua manawhin Jesuh a pai laitakin Samaria leh Galilee gam kikal tawnin a pai hi
Khuaneu khatah a lut dektak laitakin miphak sawm in a dawntuah uh hi. Jesuh tawh a kigamla munah ding uh a
nakpi takin kiko-in, “Topa Jesuh aw, kote hong hehpih in,” a ci uh hi
Jesuh in amaute a muh ciangin, “Pai un la siampite va kivelsak un,” a ci hi. Amaute a va pai uh ciangin lamkalah a dam uh hi
Amaute sung panin a damlam a kitheih ciangin khat hong lehtai kik a, nakpi takin Pasian a phat hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh' khe mai-ah bokin a lungdamna a ko hi. Hih mipa pen Samaria mi ahi hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh hong paukhia a, “Mihing sawm kidamsak hilo ahi hiam? Adang kuate koi lai-ah om ahi uh hiam
Bang hangin hih gamdang mipa bek Pasian' tungah lungdamna a ko dingin hong kileh ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Tho in la ciah in. Na upna in nang hong damsak hi,” a ci hi.
Khatvei Farisi mite pawlkhat in, cik ciangin Pasian' Ukna hun hong tung ding ahi hiam, ci-in Jesuh dong uh a, Jesuh in, “Pasian' Ukna pen mit tawh muhtheihin hong tunglo ding hi
Hih lai-ah om hi, hua lai-ah om hi, cih bangin kuama gentheih hilo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note lakah Pasian' Ukna hong om khinzo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in nungzuite kiangah, “Nikhat ni ciangin Mihing Tapa nikhat sung bek nangawn na muhnop hun uh hong tung ding a, ahi zongin na mu kei ding uh hi
Mite in, ‘Hih lai-ah om hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi. Ahi zongin amau' cihna mun a en dingin paikhia kei un
Amah hong pai taktak ciangin khuaphialep in van mong khat pan mong khat dong hong taan'zaih mah bangin kitheikim ding hi
Ahi zongin amah in gimna tampi tak thuak masa ding a, ama huna mite in amah nial ding uh hi
Noah hunin uplohpi-in tuiciin a tun' bangin Mihing Tapa zong uploh hun khatin hong tung ding hi
Teembaw sungah Noah lutin Tuiciin in mi khempeuh a sihsak ni ciangdongin tua huna mite in anne zune-in om uh a, mo kipi mo kikha-in a om uh hi
Lot huna mah tawh zong hong kibang ding hi. Tua hun lai-in zong anne zune-in om uh a, sumlei sumzuak, lokho, inn lamin a omom laitakun
Sodom panin Lot a paikhiat ni-in van panin kaat leh meikuang hong kiasuk a, amaute khempeuh a kangtum hi
Mihing Tapa hong kilat ni ciangin zong tua mah tawh hong kibang ding hi
“Tuani a hong tun' ciangin a innkhum zangah a om mipa in a innsunga a om a neihsate a la dingin kumsuk kei hen. Tua mah bangin lo-ah a om mipa zong a inn-ah ciahkik kei hen
Lot' zi na phawk un
A nuntakna a hunuamte in a nuntakna bulpi taanlawh ding a, a nuntakna a taanlawhte in a nuntakna bulpi huzo ding hi
Ke'n kong cihin-ah, tuahun laitakin zanin lupna tungah a lumkhawm mi nih sung panin khat kila-in khat kinusia ding hi
An a sukhawm numei nih, khat kila-in khat kinusia ding hi
Lo a kuankhawm mi nih, khat kila-in khat kinusia ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin a nungzuite in Jesuh kiangah, “Topa aw, koi laitakah tua thute hong piang ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin Jesuh in, “Sapul omna peuhah musane a om mah bangin mi omna peuhah hong piang ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.
